Hiii and a happu new year to everyone!! 2024 felt like a speedrun. So much happened in this year, some downhills, some good things. It was a roller coaster. I decided to make a nagi bot since I’m pretty kazy myself and today and my head came to a conclusiona bout that: nagi=lazy. Yeah, out of my laziness, i made a nagi bot :3
